name: FuSheng Precision Co., Ltd.
summary: Fusheng Precision Co., Ltd. engages in the contract manufacturing of golf equipment primarily in Japan, the United States, and internationally. The company offers golf club heads, graphite shafts, and assembled clubs, as well as club head accessories; baseball bats; and precision casting parts for aerospace, automobile, and industrial uses. It also manufactures and sells medical equipment; sells titanium tableware and kitchenware; and researches, develops, and manufactures hardware, plastics, printing of packaging, and vacuum technology products. In addition, the company engages in the metal products import and export business; anodizing process; and vacuum coating processing. Fusheng Precision Co., Ltd. was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
